segments.text: LISA:Hi TONY, thanks ever so much for coming.
segments.translation: 丽莎：你好，托尼。非常感谢你能来。

segments.text: You know we've been asked to organize something for Johns farewell?
segments.translation: 人们想让我们准备约翰的欢送会？

segments.text: TONY:Yeah, sure, it's about time we started working out details.
segments.translation: 托尼：是啊，当然，我们是时候该解决细节问题了。

segments.text: LISA:Exactly.We don't want to leave it so late that it's double the work.
segments.translation: 丽莎：没错，我们不想拖太久，最后增加工作量。

segments.text: TONY:Mmm, mm.right, do you want me to take notes?
segments.translation: 托尼：好的，你想让我记笔记吗？

segments.text: LISA:That'd be great, thanks.
segments.translation: 丽莎：这样太好了，谢谢。

segments.text: TONY:Right, first thing is, when is the best time to hold it?
segments.translation: 托尼：好的，首先是举行的最佳时间是什么？

segments.text: LISA:Well, he leaves on the twenty-fourth of December.
segments.translation: 丽莎：他在12月24日离开。

segments.text: TONY:So what about the twenty-second?
segments.translation: 托尼：那22日怎么样？

segments.text: LISA:Yeah.I think that's about right.
segments.translation: 丽莎：好的，我觉得很合适。

segments.text: We want it quite near the time, don't we?
segments.translation: 我们要在他快走的时候举行，不是吗？

segments.text: TONY:Sure, and what about a venue?
segments.translation: 托尼：对。场地呢？

segments.text: In college?A hotel?
segments.translation: 在大学还是酒店举行？

segments.text: LISA:I think a hotel will probably work out rather expensive, and I've been looking at the College Dining Room; that seems pretty reasonable.
segments.translation: 丽莎：我认为酒店可能太贵了，学校的餐厅比较合适，价钱好像很合理。

segments.text: TONY:Fine, yeah, why not?
segments.translation: 托尼：好的，为什么不呢？

segments.text: LISA:And then we ought to be thinking about invitations ... Who mustn't we forget to invite?
segments.translation: 丽莎：之后我们应该想想邀请函的事了，谁是我们必须不能忘记请的？

segments.text: TONY:Well, obviously John and his wife.
segments.translation: 托尼：显然是约翰和他的妻子。

segments.text: LISA:Right.
segments.translation: 丽莎：没错。

segments.text: TONY:And the Director.
segments.translation: 托尼：还有主任。

segments.text: LISA:Ah ha.
segments.translation: 丽莎：啊哈。

segments.text: TONY:The office Staff.
segments.translation: 托尼：办公室工作人员。

segments.text: LISA:Yep, and all the teachers and all the students.
segments.translation: 丽莎：是的，还有所有的老师和学生。

segments.text: TONY:Anyone else?
segments.translation: 托尼：还有谁？

segments.text: LISA:Faculty Heads?
segments.translation: 丽莎：系里的领导？

segments.text: TONY:No.better draw the line.
segments.translation: 托尼：不，最好就到这里了，

segments.text: I don't think it's necessary.
segments.translation: 我觉得没必要。

segments.text: LISA:Yeah, you're right.
segments.translation: 丽莎：是的，你是对的。

segments.text: TONY:I don't mind writing the invitations.
segments.translation: 托尼：我不介意写邀请信。

segments.text: When shall we get them out for?
segments.translation: 我们什么时候发出去？

segments.text: LISA:Enough time but not too early.
segments.translation: 丽莎：时间很充足，不要太早了。

segments.text: What about the fifteenth of December?
segments.translation: 12月15日怎么样？

segments.text: TONY:Well, there are exams on the sixteenth - better avoid them.
segments.translation: 托尼：16日有考试，最好错过它们。

segments.text: LISA:Tenth?
segments.translation: 丽莎：10号？

segments.text: TONY:Yeah, that should do it.
segments.translation: 托尼：好的，就这天了。

segments.text: LISA:So what does that leave?
segments.translation: 丽莎：那么还剩下什么？

segments.text: Oh yes, a present
segments.translation: 对了，礼物。

segments.text: TONY:Would you mind doing that?
segments.translation: 托尼：你介意做这个吗？

segments.text: LISA:No.not at all; we usually go round with an envelope during coffee break, don't we?
segments.translation: 丽莎：不介意。我们经常在咖啡时间拿着信封走来走去，不是吗？

segments.text: TONY:Yeah, coffee breaks always the best time, 'cos people have got their money handy.
segments.translation: 托尼：是的，喝咖啡的休息时间很合适，因为人们手边正好有钱。

segments.text: LISA:Yeah, exactly.
segments.translation: 丽莎：没错。

segments.text: Do we suggest an amount?
segments.translation: 我们得要求数额吗？

segments.text: Or does it seem a bit unfair?
segments.translation: 或者这么做是不是有点不公平？

segments.text: TONY:No.I think people welcome it.
segments.translation: 托尼：没事，我觉得人们不介意。

segments.text: We suggested six dollars last time, is that OK?
segments.translation: 我们上次建议交6美元，这样可以吗？

segments.text: LISA:Yeah, plenty I would have thought, which should leave us with about ninety dollars.
segments.translation: 丽莎：可以，我觉得足够了，这样我们应该就有90美元了？

segments.text: TONY:Have you any ideas for presents?
segments.translation: 托尼：你想好买什么礼物了吗？

segments.text: LISA:Well, I've been having a little think.
segments.translation: 丽莎：我有一点想法，

segments.text: I thought, you know, he loves music.
segments.translation: 你知道，我想他喜欢音乐。

segments.text: TONY:Yeah, and books.
segments.translation: 托尼：是的，还有书。

segments.text: LISA:So, I thought I'd check on prices for, well, perhaps CD players.
segments.translation: 丽莎：所以我想根据价钱也许CD播放器合适？

segments.text: TONY:Yeah, that's a, that's a good idea, and also I thought maybe, you know, a set of dictionaries.
segments.translation: 托尼：好的，好主意，我还觉得一套字典也不错。

segments.text: I heard him say he needed a good one.
segments.translation: 我听他说他想要一套好字典。

segments.text: LISA:The other thing he was saying last week was that his computer printer had broken.
segments.translation: 丽莎：上周他还说过他的电脑打印机坏了。

segments.text: TONY:Umm.No.I'd be really frightened about getting the wrong type.
segments.translation: 托尼：不，我怕买到错误的机型。

segments.text: LISA:OK, yeah.
segments.translation: 丽莎：好的。

segments.text: TONY:The other thing is something for the home - Jill suggested a coffee maker.
segments.translation: 托尼：另一件是给家里预备的，吉尔建议买咖啡机。

segments.text: LISA:Oh yeah.I'll certainly find out what they cost.
segments.translation: 丽莎：好的，我肯定会去看看它们的价格。

segments.text: OK, have you got all that down?
segments.translation: 好的，你都记下了吗？

segments.text: TONY:Yes.
segments.translation: 托尼：是的。

segments.text: LISA:Now we need to think a little more about the money.
segments.translation: 丽莎：不，我们得再考虑一下资金问题。

segments.text: I know we've got a set amount from the Social Fund.
segments.translation: 我知道我们已经从社会筹资上得到了一部分钱。

segments.text: TONY:Right, what does that cover?
segments.translation: 托尼：是的，都能包括什么？

segments.text: LISA:It's meant to cover the cost of the room.
segments.translation: 丽莎：这包括房间的花费。

segments.text: TONY:Yeah.
segments.translation: 托尼：好的。

segments.text: LISA:And a certain amount for food.
segments.translation: 丽莎：还包括一部分食物。

segments.text: TONY:And also drinks?
segments.translation: 托尼：也包括酒水吗？

segments.text: LISA:Oh yeah, certainly.
segments.translation: 丽莎：当然。

segments.text: TONY:But will it be enough?
segments.translation: 托尼：这是不是就够了？

segments.text: LISA:What we've done in the past is to ask guests to bring some snacks
segments.translation: 丽莎：过去我们是让客人自己带一些点心来。

segments.text: TONY:Right.
segments.translation: 托尼：对

segments.text: LISA:We don't ask them to bring more drinks because we figure that's ... that should come from the Social Fund.
segments.translation: 丽莎：我们不要求他们带酒水来。因为我们认为这些应该出自社会筹款的部分。

segments.text: TONY:OK.Anything else for the guests to bring?
segments.translation: 托尼：好的，还有什么要求客人带来的吗？

segments.text: LISA:Well, some music, because there'll be a tape deck there in the room, and we can have some dancing later on.
segments.translation: 丽莎：一些音乐。因为房间里有录音机，我们之后可以跳跳舞。

segments.text: TONY:Anything else?
segments.translation: 托尼：还有什么要准备的吗？

segments.text: LISA:Well, it's just a thought, but a couple of years ago we had a really good party where we set up, you know, some simple games.
segments.translation: 丽莎：只是一个想法，但是几年前我们举办过一个很棒的聚会，我们会设置一些小游戏。

segments.text: TONY:Yeah, great. Wasn't it based on photos, from the students and teachers?
segments.translation: 托尼：太好了。是不是根据师生的照片？

segments.text: LISA:That's right.
segments.translation: 丽莎：没错。

segments.text: TONY:So we should ask the guests to bring photos.
segments.translation: 托尼：那么我们应该要求客人带照片来，

segments.text: OK.I'll put it on the invitations.
segments.translation: 好的，我把这点写在邀请信上。

segments.text: LISA:Now the last thing is, who shall we ask to do the speech?
segments.translation: 丽莎：最后的事情是我们请谁来发表演讲？

segments.text: TONY:Don't you think it might be nice to have one of the students?
segments.translation: 托尼：你不觉得让其中某位学生来做会很好吗？

segments.text: LISA:Well then, the Student Leader?
segments.translation: 丽莎：那么，学生干部怎样？

segments.text: TONY:Yeah, much better than the Director giving speeches again.
segments.translation: 托尼：是的，这比主任再次发表演讲要好得多。

segments.text: LISA:OK then, I'll ask her.
segments.translation: 丽莎：好吧，我会问问她。

segments.text: Lovely!So, is that all?
segments.translation: 不错，就这么多了吧？

segments.text: TONY:Looks like it.
segments.translation: 托尼：看起来是的。

segments.text: LISA:Great.Thanks ever so much... (fade out)
segments.translation: 丽莎：太棒了，很感谢你......（淡出）
